message:
test(bd-1msb): cover remaining combinator.rs branches

Add 8 new tests for combinator covering: join_all_results ok/err
collection, race with multiple futures, race_timeout delegation,
quorum_timeout delegation, QuorumResult is_success/into_results,
QuorumResult Debug, all-failure quorum, and first_ok last error
propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
